description: Includes a sequential study of subject material in agribusiness management and managerial economics related to the management of agricultural businesses. Topics related to agribusiness management in the U.S., including organizational structure, marketing, strategy, financial statements, financing and production planning. Concepts from managerial economics as applied to the agribusiness firm, including production theory, cost analysis, pricing strategies, cost-benefit analysis, investment decisions and competition strategies.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (ECON 301or311) andA A E 335, or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (ECON 301or311) andA A E 335, or graduate/professional standing
